A test script that verifies the property value of an object in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple script that defines an object `a` with a single property `b` set to the value `5`. It then uses an `assert` statement to verify that the value of `a.b` is indeed `5`. This script provides narrow functionality, primarily serving as a basic test to ensure that the property `b` of object `a` holds the expected value. The use of `assert` indicates that this code is likely part of a testing or validation process.
